Our Properties

4 Locations Across
Ahmedabad

Strategically located near colleges, offices, and commercial hubs — so your commute stays easy.

01
Makarba
Well-connected locality near SP Ring Road and major office hubs. Ideal for working professionals and MBA students.
📍 Makarba, Ahmedabad
02
Amber Tower
Premium location with easy access to commercial areas and all major public transport links in the city.
📍 Amber Tower, Ahmedabad
03
TP 85
Located in the TP 85 scheme — a peaceful, well-planned neighbourhood with all essential amenities nearby.
📍 TP 85, Ahmedabad
04
Sarkhej
Near Sarkhej-Gandhinagar Highway with excellent connectivity. Easy access to GIFT City and major tech parks.
📍 Sarkhej, Ahmedabad

Pricing

Simple & Transparent
Pricing

Choose the sharing option that works for you. Exact rates are location-specific — contact us for a confirmed quote.

3-Sharing Room
Comfortable room shared among 3 residents with individual storage
₹5,000 – ₹7,000
per person / month (approx)
  • Furnished bed & individual wardrobe
  • Shared bathroom (clean daily)
  • Wi-Fi & electricity included
  • Housekeeping included
  • Meals available on request
